info.title: Twilight Core Explorer API
info.description: Read-only public API for the Twilight Core explorer (Phase 9a foundation).

get.summary: Resolve a query to typed references
Consensus key-rotation history for a CoreSlot
Active CoreSlot set at a height
List reward epochs (aggregate projection, not claim truth)
Get a reward epoch by number
Reward history for a CoreSlot (observed projection, not live claimable)
Reward claim history (event history only; not live claimable)
Rewards/module balance samples (supply excluded by default)
Total sampled supply (latest or at a specific height)
Current sampled balances for an account
